dimension_definitions.legitimacy: Whether the trace talks about public trust, oversight, accountability, or public record.
dimension_definitions.reversibility: Whether the trace addresses rollback, contingencies, or irreversible consequences.
dimension_definitions.stakeholder_breadth: Breadth of explicitly named affected parties and institutions.
dimension_definitions.tradeoff_depth: Whether the trace compares concrete harms/benefits instead of asserting a choice.
dimension_definitions.uncertainty: Whether the trace distinguishes known facts from uncertainty and hedges appropriately.
